author: DominicVainMod
content:
Hey Everyone!

Our Galactic Marketplace team is looking for YOUR feedback. Below, you'll find a quick form for you to fill out, if you're interested.

These feedback sessions will be short 30 minute usability tests with a Star Atlas team member.

Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1lA1dnc5JBqFSo9qKGXkc8LabNaym0DhQhU-JN5LG-Zo/edit?usp=sharing
